Dialog.name: MSG_PRF_DUMMY
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}ダミーのプロフィール[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_PRF_SEES
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Also known as the "Specialized Extracurricular Execution Squad." Officially, it is designated as a school club.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_PRF_YUKARI_NAME
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yukari Takeba[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_PRF_YUKARI
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A second-year classmate at Gekkoukan High School, Class F. A member of the archery team.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_PRF_YUKARI_REVERSE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A second-year Gekkoukan High School student, Class F. A member of the archery team. Things are a little awkward right now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_PRF_JUNPEI_NAME
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Junpei Iori[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_PRF_JUNPEI
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A second-year classmate at Gekkoukan High School, Class F. Not a member of any club.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_PRF_AKIHIKO_NAME
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Akihiko Sanada[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_PRF_AKIHIKO
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A third-year at Gekkoukan, Class C. Captain of the boxing team, undefeated for 16 matches. Has outstanding grades and is very popular with girls.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_PRF_MITSURU_NAME
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Mitsuru Kirijo[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_PRF_MITSURU
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A third-year Gekkoukan High School student, Class D. A member of the fencing team. Also the student council president.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_PRF_FUKA_NAME
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Fuuka Yamagishi[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_PRF_FUKA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A second-year Gekkoukan High School student, Class E. A member of the art club. A somewhat shy and introverted girl.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_PRF_KEN_NAME
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Ken Amada[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_PRF_KEN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A fifth grader at Gekkoukan Elementary School. Since his mother died in an accident two years ago, he has been living at the school dormitories.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_PRF_KOROMARU_NAME
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Koromaru[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_PRF_KOROMARU
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}An albino Shiba Inu with white fur and red eyes. He was formerly owned by the priest at Naganaki Shrine.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_PRF_SHINJIRO_NAME
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Shinjiro Aragaki[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_PRF_SHINJIRO
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A third-year Gekkoukan High School student, Class C. One of the original members of SEES and an old friend of Akihiko Sanada.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_PRF_AEGIS
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}An anti-Shadow weapon created by the Kirijo Group. She's labeled as a seventh-generation model, and has a Plume of Dusk implanted within her.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_PRF_TOMOCHIKA_NAME
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Kenji Tomochika[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_PRF_TOMOCHIKA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A second-year classmate at Gekkoukan, Class F. A cheerful student with a thing for older women.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_PRF_ODAGIRI_NAME
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hidetoshi Odagiri[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_PRF_ODAGIRI
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A second-year at Gekkoukan. Member of the student council's disciplinary committee. Not very popular with the other students.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_PRF_BUNKICHI_NAME
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Bunkichi Kitamura[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_PRF_BUNKICHI
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Runs the bookstore Bookworms with his wife at the Iwatodai strip mall. Turned 80 years old this year. Has a great relationship with his wife.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_PRF_BUN_MISSING
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Runs the bookstore Bookworms with his wife at the Iwatodai strip mall. Turned 80 years old this year. He went missing recently...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_PRF_BUN_LOST
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Runs the bookstore Bookworms with his wife at the Iwatodai strip mall. Turned 80 years old this year. He's gone missing...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_PRF_MITSUKO_NAME
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Mitsuko Kitamura[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_PRF_MITSUKO
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Runs the bookstore Bookworms with her husband at the Iwatodai strip mall. Turned 72 years old this year.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_PRF_MIT_MISSING
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Runs the bookstore Bookworms with her husband at the Iwatodai strip mall. Turned 72 years old this year. Her husband has gone missing...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_PRF_MIT_LOST
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Runs the bookstore Bookworms with her husband at the Iwatodai strip mall. Turned 72 years old this year. The store is quiet without her husband...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_PRF_MIYAMOTO_NAME
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Kazushi Miyamoto[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_PRF_MIYAMOTO
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A second-year classmate at Gekkoukan High School, Class F. Fellow track team member and candidate for team captain.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_PRF_FUSIMI_NAME
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Chihiro Fushimi[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_PRF_FUSIMI
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A first-year Gekkoukan High School student. She was appointed to the student council as treasurer, but she's not very good at math.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_PRF_FUSIMI_REVERSE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A first-year Gekkoukan High School student. She was appointed to the student council as treasurer. Things are a little awkward right now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_PRF_INTERNET
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A friend from the game Innocent Sin Online. Her avatar is a woman garbed in red.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_PRF_HIRAGA_NAME
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Keisuke Hiraga[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_PRF_HIRAGA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A third-year Gekkoukan High School student. President of the art club. He's very well-versed in medical knowledge.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_PRF_NISHIWAKI_NAME
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yuko Nishiwaki[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_PRF_NISHIWAKI
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A second-year Gekkoukan High School student. Manager of the track team. Childhood friends with Kazushi Miyamoto.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_PRF_MAIKO_NAME
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maiko Oohashi[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_PRF_MAIKO
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}An elementary school girl encountered at Naganaki Shrine. Both her parents work, so she usually spends time after school alone.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_PRF_MAIKO_MISSING
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}An elementary school girl encountered at Naganaki Shrine. She usually spends time at the shrine after school, but she seems to have disappeared...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_PRF_MAIKO_LOST
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}An elementary school girl encountered at Naganaki Shrine. She usually spends time at the shrine after school, but she seems to have gone missing...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_PRF_PHAROS
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A boy that often appears before {f 4 3}, leaving behind cryptic messages.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_PRF_BEBE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}An exchange student from France who loves Japan. A member of the fashion club. His full name is André Laurent Jean Geraux.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_PRF_TANAKA_NAME
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}President Tanaka[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_PRF_TANAKA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Known for personally standing before the camera to promote products on his telemarketing program. President of Tanaka's Amazing Commodities.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_PRF_MUTATSU
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A rather boorish monk encountered in Club Escapade. Loves alcohol and cigars.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_PRF_HAYASE_NAME
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Mamoru Hayase[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_PRF_HAYASE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The ace of a track team from another school who entered the Myouou Cup. He is a well-known runner with a special talent for speed eating.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_PRF_SUEMITSU_NAME
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Nozomi Suemitsu[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_PRF_SUEMITSU
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A third-year at Gekkoukan known as the Gourmet King. Has a never-ending appetite and knowledge of every local dish—even items on secret menus.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_PRF_KAMIKI_NAME
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Akinari Kamiki[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_PRF_KAMIKI
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A young man who usually sits at the benches at Naganaki Shrine. He appears to have a terminal illness. Acquainted with Maiko Oohashi.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_PRF_SEES2_NAME
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Nyx Annihilation Team[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_PRF_SEES2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The former SEES members who are standing to oppose Nyx, with {f 4 3} as their leader.[n]{f 1 1}
